findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "web_search_query" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Semantic web search for finding relevant pages, documents, and current information. Alternative to Exa search at 3x lower cost. Returns structured JSON results …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
